## Summary

- What changed and why?

## Knowledge Sync Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed `CORE_RULES.md` and `docs/RBAC_STANDARD.md` before coding.
- [ ] If behavior/logic changed, I updated at least one canonical knowledge doc:
  - `docs/DECISIONS.md`
  - `docs/CHANGELOG_PROJECT.md`
  - `docs/BUSINESS_RULES.md`
  - `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`
  - `docs/OPERATION_RUNBOOK.md`
  - `docs/INCIDENT_LOG.md` (for incidents)
- [ ] I did not use destructive database operations.
- [ ] Changes are backward-compatible with existing production data.

## Validation

- [ ] Lint/build/tests (if applicable) pass.
- [ ] Access control behavior is verified for `superadmin/admin/user`.
